title: Developments in India’s Balance of Payments during the Fourth Quarter (January-March) of 2025-26
description: Preliminary data on India's balance of payments (BoP) for the fourth quarter (Q4), i.e., January-March 2025-26, are presented in Statements I and II. Key Features of India’s BoP in Q4:2025-26 India’s current account surplus stood at US$ 7.1 billion (0.7 per cent of GDP) in Q4:2025-26 as compared to US$ 13.7 billion (1.4 per cent of GDP) in Q4:2024-25 (Table 1).1,2 Merchandise trade deficit at US$ 83.4 billion in Q4:2025-26 was higher than US$ 59.3 billion in Q4:2024-25. Net services
